response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack credentials, distributed systems exposure at scale (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of requests/sec), and relevant low-latency systems experience in DLang. However, the role requires modern C++ or Rust as the primary skill, and the resume shows only limited, dated C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015) with no Rust experience. There is also no geospatial routing/navigation pipeline background, though GISCollective demonstrates genuine geospatial domain interest.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS experience via GISCollective and Green Map work
Distributed, low-latency systems background at Sociomantic (millions req/sec)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testability focus
concerns: Only ~6 months of dated C/C++ experience (2014-2015); no Rust
No navigation/routing tile or map-data pipeline background
Recent work is primarily TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming
